units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Tailscale Docker Container
After=docker.service
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run \
 --name tailscale \
 --rm \
 --hostname vpn-server \
 --network host \
 --label com.centurylinklabs.watchtower.enable=true \
 -e TS_AUTHKEY=tskey-auth-PLACEHOLDER \
 -e TS_STATE_DIR=/var/lib/tailscale \
 -e TS_USERSPACE=false \
 -e TS_EXTRA_ARGS="--advertise-exit-node" \
 -e TS_TAILSCALED_EXTRA_ARGS="--port=41641 --no-logs-no-support" \
 -v tailscale:/var/lib/tailscale \
 --device=/dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun \
 --cap-add=NET_ADMIN \
 ghcr.io/tailscale/tailscale:latest
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop tailscale
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
units.name: tailscale.service

units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Pi-hole DNS Ad Blocker
After=docker.service network-online.target tailscale.service iptables-restore.service
Requires=docker.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/docker rm -f pihole || true
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run \
 --name pihole \
 --rm \
 --hostname pihole \
 --network host \
 --label com.centurylinklabs.watchtower.enable=true \
 -e TZ=Pacific/Auckland \
 -e WEBPASSWORD=ChangeThisToAStrongPassword123! \
 -e DNSMASQ_LISTENING=ALL \
 -e FTLCONF_dns_listeningMode=ALL \
 -e DNS_UPSTREAMS=1.1.1.1;1.0.0.1;9.9.9.9 \
 -v /var/lib/pihole/etc-pihole:/etc/pihole:Z \
 -v /var/lib/pihole/etc-dnsmasq.d:/etc/dnsmasq.d:Z \
 --cap-add=NET_ADMIN \
 --cap-add=SETFCAP \
 pihole/pihole:latest
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop pihole
Restart=always
RestartSec=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
units.name: pihole.service

units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Watchtower Docker Container Auto-Updater
After=docker.service
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker run \
 --name watchtower \
 --rm \
 --label com.centurylinklabs.watchtower.enable=true \
 -e WATCHTOWER_LABEL_ENABLE=true \
 -e WATCHTOWER_CLEANUP=true \
 -e WATCHTOWER_NO_RESTART=true \
 -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \
 ghcr.io/containrrr/watchtower:latest
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker stop watchtower
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
units.name: watchtower.service

units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Restore iptables rules
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/sbin/iptables-restore -n /var/lib/iptables/rules-save
RemainAfterExit=yes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
units.name: iptables-restore.service
